query:
INSERT INTO books (title, author, description, coverImage, purchaseUrl, slug, sortOrder, bookType, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES 
('The Patient Pastor', 'Pastors Connection Network', 'How to Lead Change Without Losing Your Church or Your Mind. Book 10 in The Hard Issues Series. ('Change Without Casualties', 'Pastors Connection Network', 'A Playbook for Introducing Major Ministry Decisions. Book 11 in The Hard Issues Series. ('Changing the Unchangeable', 'Pastors Connection Network', 'Leading Reform When We''ve Always Done It This Way. Book 12 in The Hard Issues Series. Navigate institutional resistance and lead meaningful transformation in traditional churches.', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/ebook-changing-unchangeable-VN8VLsjHvG7LjaCoDSt7N9.webp', 'https://pastorsconnectionnetwork.com/store', 'pcn-changing-unchangeable', 34, 'authored', NOW(), NOW()),
